# Introducing Apache Commons Configuration

<table class="layout-table">
<tr>
<td>
</td>
<td>
<section><a id="Introducing_Apache_Commons_Configuration"></a>
<h1>Introducing Apache Commons Configuration</h1>
<p>
      	The Commons Configuration software library provides a generic configuration interface which enables
        a Java application to read configuration data from a variety of sources. Commons Configuration
      	provides typed access to single, and multi-valued configuration parameters as demonstrated
        by the following code:

</p>
<pre><code>Double double = config.getDouble("number");
Integer integer = config.getInteger("number");</code></pre>
<p>
        Configuration parameters may be loaded from the following sources:
      </p>
<ul>
<li>Properties files</li>
<li>XML documents</li>
<li>Windows INI files</li>
<li>Property list files (plist)</li>
<li>JNDI</li>
<li>JDBC Datasource</li>
<li>System properties</li>
<li>Applet parameters</li>
<li>Servlet parameters</li>
</ul>
<p>
        Configuration objects are created using configuration builders.
        Different configuration sources can be mixed using a <code>CombinedConfigurationBuilder</code> and
        a <code>CombinedConfiguration</code>. Additional sources of configuration parameters can
        be created by using custom configuration objects. This customization can be achieved by
        extending <code>AbstractConfiguration</code> or <code>AbstractHierarchicalConfiguration</code>.
      </p>
<p>
        The full Javadoc API documentation is available <a href="https://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-configuration/apidocs/index.html">here</a>.
      </p>
</section>
<section><a id="Commons_Configuration_1.x_and_2.x"></a>
<h1>Commons Configuration 1.x and 2.x</h1>
<p>
      New projects should use 2.x, first released in 2016, under the Maven coordinates <code>org.apache.commons:commons-configuration2</code>.
    </p>
<p>
      The 1.x codebase no longer receives updates.
      Denial of service issues that rely on loading untrusted data from configuration files,
      or passing untrusted data to the API, are outside the scope of the 1.x security model
      and will not be fixed. Upgrading your application from 1.x to 2.x will require at least changing import statement
      code changes and possibly more, see the <a href="#userguide-upgradeto2_0">migration guide for 2.0</a>.
    </p>
<p>
      The most recent Commons Configuration 2.x release can be downloaded from the
      <a href="https://commons.apache.org/configuration/download_configuration.cgi">Apache download area</a>.
      The artifacts have also been deployed to
      <a href="https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/">Maven central</a>. Commons Configuration 1.x
      artifacts are also available under their original Maven coordinates.
    </p>
</section>
<section><a id="History"></a>
<h1>History</h1>
<p>
        Commons Configuration started as code in Apache JServ.  The JServ code was subsequently
        added to <a href="https://jakarta.apache.org/turbine">Jakarta Turbine</a>. After Jakarta
        Turbine, this configuration interface moved to <a href="https://jakarta.apache.org/velocity">Jakarta Velocity</a>
        and underwent various improvements.  After Velocity, this code was introduced to the
        <a href="https://commons.apache.org/">Apache Commons</a> as <code>ExtendedProperties</code>.
        Configuration began life in the Commons as a Sandbox component and was promoted to the
        Commons Proper in late 2003.
      </p>
</section>
</td>
</tr>
</table>

<h2>Release 2.12.0 – 2025-04-22</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertyConverter.to(Class, Object, DefaultConversionHandler) doesn't convert custom java.lang.Number subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DefaultConversionHandler.convertValue(Object, Class, ConfigurationInterpolator) doesn't convert custom java.lang.Number subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DefaultConversionHandler.to(Object, Class, ConfigurationInterpolator) doesn't convert custom java.lang.Number subclasses. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SubsetConfiguration does not account for delimiters as it did in 2.9.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-848">CONFIGURATION-848</a>. Thanks to Laszlo Hujber, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CompositeConfiguration does not account for delimiters as it did in 2.9.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-848">CONFIGURATION-848</a>. Thanks to Laszlo Hujber, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Describe the security model #540. Thanks to Arnout Engelen, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>De-emphasize the 1.x version line on the website #539. Thanks to Arnout Engelen, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HomeDirectoryLocationStrategy no longer resolves the user HOME directory correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-851">CONFIGURATION-851</a>. Thanks to Scott Babcock, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PrefixedKeysIterator.toString() to package-private PrefixedKeysIterator. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New web configurations using the jakarta.servlet namespace are now available. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-836">CONFIGURATION-836</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.web.JakartaServletConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-836">CONFIGURATION-836</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.web.JakartaServletContextConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-836">CONFIGURATION-836</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.web.JakartaServletFilterConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-836">CONFIGURATION-836</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.web.JakartaServletRequestConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-836">CONFIGURATION-836</a>. Thanks to Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<h2>Release 2.11.0 – 2024-06-07</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for empty sections #408. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-844">CONFIGURATION-844</a>. Thanks to Thomas Steiner, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ImmutableConfiguration.containsValue(Object). Thanks to Rikkarth, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if DataConfiguration.DataConfiguration(Configuration) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if XMLPropertiesConfiguration.XMLPropertiesConfiguration(Element) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if a SubsetConfiguration constructor is called with a null Configuration. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Methods should not be empty #393. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-843">CONFIGURATION-843</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Guard MapConfiguration against null maps #381. Thanks to Heewon Lee, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if AppletConfiguration(Applet) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletConfiguration(Servlet) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletConfiguration(ServletConfig) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletContextConfiguration(Servlet) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletContextConfiguration(ServletContext) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletFilterConfiguration(FilterConfig) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fail-fast with a NullPointerException if ServletRequestConfiguration(ServletRequest) is called with null. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Deprecate DatabaseConfiguration.getDatasource() in favor of getDataSource(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD DynamicCombinedConfiguration in AbstractImmutableNodeHandler. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD DynamicCombinedConfiguration in AbstractListDelimiterHandler. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD DynamicCombinedConfiguration in DefaultPrefixLookupsHolder. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD DynamicCombinedConfiguration in DynamicCombinedConfiguration. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix PMD DynamicCombinedConfiguration in PropertiesConfiguration. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Restore previous behavior allowing Spring to inject multiple values #425. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-846">CONFIGURATION-846</a>. Thanks to Andrea Bollini, Gary Gregory, Tim Donohue, kbarlowgw.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Property with an empty string value was not processed #431. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-847">CONFIGURATION-847</a>. Thanks to Andrea Bollini, Gary Gregory, Tim Donohue, kbarlowgw.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-logging:commons-logging from 1.3.0 to 1.3.2 #390, #418. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-io:commons-io from 2.15.1 to 2.16.1 #394, #400. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>

<tr>

<h2>Release 2.10.1 – 2024-03-17</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>java.lang.module.FindException: Module servlet.api not found. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-839">CONFIGURATION-839</a>. Thanks to Bob Marinier, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>StackOverflowError adding property in AbstractListDelimiterHandler.flattenIterator(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-840">CONFIGURATION-840</a>. Thanks to Bob Marinier, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>StackOverflowError calling ListDelimiterHandler.flatten(Object, int) with a cyclical object tree. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-841">CONFIGURATION-841</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump jackson-databind from 2.16.1 to 2.17.0 #378. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump log4j.version from 2.23.0 to 2.23.1 #379. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump spring.version from 5.3.32 to 5.3.33 #380. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.10.0"></a>
<h2>Release 2.10.0 – 2024-03-06</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>[StepSecurity] ci: Harden GitHub Actions #307. Thanks to step-security-bot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ConfirgurationPropertySource doesn't supply resolved values #309. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-834">CONFIGURATION-834</a>. Thanks to Keith Barlow, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Take prefix delimiter into account when SubsetConfiguration.getKeysInternal() is called #300. Thanks to KeijoB, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Guard ConfigurationMap against null configuration #355. Thanks to Heewon Lee, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Properties parser stack overflows on large single-key inputs #369. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-838">CONFIGURATION-838</a>. Thanks to Ian Lynagh.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration.AbstractJdbcOperation.execute() throws NullPointerException when no data source is set #368. Thanks to Heewon Lee, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add AbstractConfiguration.getKeysInternal(String, String) #300. Thanks to KeijoB, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>

<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add Maven property project.build.outputTimestamp for build reproducibility. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>

<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.8.0"></a>
<h2>Release 2.8.0 – 2022-07-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Make interpolation of collections and arrays in ConfigurationInterpolator consistent with
         behavior of DefaultConversionHandler. Add ConfigurationInterpolator.setStringConverter to
         allow customized string conversion behavior. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-753">CONFIGURATION-753</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--mattjuntunen">mattjuntunen</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Computation of blank lines after header comment #82. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-795">CONFIGURATION-795</a>. Thanks to dpeger.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Remove redundant initializer #110. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-801">CONFIGURATION-801</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use final #111. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-802">CONFIGURATION-802</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Java 8 lambda improvements and more #112. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-803">CONFIGURATION-803</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Redundant local variable #113. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-804">CONFIGURATION-804</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use try with resource #114. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-805">CONFIGURATION-805</a>. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>[Javadoc] Specify that typed getList returns null for missing key #100. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-805">CONFIGURATION-805</a>. Thanks to Roman Zaynetdinov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Mention EnvironmentConfiguration in the list of configuration sources #45. Thanks to Oliver B. Fischer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DefaultListDelimiterHandler.escapeList working only for List&gt;String&lt; #137. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-808">CONFIGURATION-808</a>. Thanks to cigaly.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Use final #141. Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replace test asserts by simpler but equivalent calls. #139 Thanks to Arturo Bernal.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Single Variable Interpolation #182. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-764">CONFIGURATION-764</a>. Thanks to Ning Zhang, Matt Juntunen, Bruno P. Kinoshita, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Implement proper concurrency in ConstantLookup. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Support new namespace jakarta.mail.* used by javamail 2.0+ (first release October 2020) #186. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-813">CONFIGURATION-813</a>. Thanks to Dependabot.</td>
<td><a href="#team--kinow">kinow</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Implement Iterable in ImmutableNode #74. Thanks to SethiPandi.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Unclosed file handle when reading config from JAR file URL.
         Add and use FileBasedBuilderProperties.setURL(URL, URLConnectionOptions). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-794">CONFIGURATION-794</a>. Thanks to Robin Jansohn, Gary Gregory, Rob Spoor.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PropertiesConfigurationLayout.getBlankLinesBefore() and deprecate getBlancLinesBefore(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PropertiesConfigurationLayout.setBlankLinesBefore() and deprecate setBlancLinesBefore(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PropertiesConfigurationLayout.PropertyLayoutData.getBlankLines() and deprecate getBlancLines(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add PropertiesConfigurationLayout.PropertyLayoutData.setBlankLines() and deprecate setBlancLines(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ImmutableConfiguration.getEnum() methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-789">CONFIGURATION-789</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ImmutableConfiguration.getDuration() methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-789">CONFIGURATION-789</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Make default interpolation prefix lookups configurable via system property. Remove dns, url, and script
        lookups from defaults. If these lookups are required for use in AbstractConfiguration subclasses, they must
        be enabled via system property. See ConfigurationInterpolator.getDefaultPrefixLookups() for details.</td>
<td><a href="#team--mattjuntunen">mattjuntunen</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump actions/cache from 2 to 3.0.4 #99, #151, #169. Thanks to Dependabot, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>

<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>

         org.springframework:spring-beans 4.3.26.RELEASE -&gt; 5.3.21

<h2>Release 2.7 – 2020-03-07</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Single argument DataConfiguration APIs always create empty arrays. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-761">CONFIGURATION-761</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Use variable arguments. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-762">CONFIGURATION-762</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.puppycrawl.tools:checkstyle from 8.24 to  8.25. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind from 2.9.9 to 2.10.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-763">CONFIGURATION-763</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Refactor XMLConfiguration.write(Writer) to add XMLConfiguration.write(Writer, Transformer). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-765">CONFIGURATION-765</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>NullPointerException in XMLConfiguration#createTransformer() when no FileLocator is set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-767">CONFIGURATION-767</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration#write does not indent XML elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-768">CONFIGURATION-768</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Bump com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind 2.10.0 -&gt; 2.10.1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-771">CONFIGURATION-771</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>[test] org.easymock:easymock 4.0.2 -&gt; 4.1. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>User's Guide &gt; Properties files &gt; Saving - small documentation bugs #41. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-773">CONFIGURATION-773</a>. Thanks to Dan Dragut.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.4.1 to 2.5.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-775">CONFIGURATION-775</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.5.0 to 2.6.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-777">CONFIGURATION-777</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional Apache Commons Codec from 1.13 to 1.14. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-778">CONFIGURATION-778</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump tests from JUnit 4.12 to 4.13. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional jackson-databind from 2.10.1 to 2.10.2. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-779">CONFIGURATION-779</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind from 2.10.2 to 2.10.3. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-783">CONFIGURATION-783</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Update org.yaml:snakeyaml from 1.25 to 1.26 and tweak parser configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-784">CONFIGURATION-784</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.springframework:spring-* from 4.3.25.RELEASE to 4.3.26.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-785">CONFIGURATION-785</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.apache.commons:commons-parent from 48 to 50 Thanks to Rob Tompkins.</td>
<td><a href="#team--chtompki">chtompki</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.6"></a>
<h2>Release 2.6 – 2019-09-13</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration cannot set arrays in the correct plist form. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-750">CONFIGURATION-750</a>. Thanks to Jason Pickens, Gary Gregory, Emmanuel Bourg.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Text from 1.6 to 1.7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-751">CONFIGURATION-751</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.3 to 2.4.1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-752">CONFIGURATION-752</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Text from 1.7 to 1.8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-754">CONFIGURATION-754</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fix Javadoc for org.apache.commons.configuration2.PropertiesConfiguration.getIncludeOptional(). Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Document "includeOptional" on the site. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>[CVE-2014-0114] Bump Apache Commons BeanUtils from 1.9.3 to 1.9.4. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-755">CONFIGURATION-755</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fix syntax in user guide documentation #33. Thanks to Kevin Wang.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow for custom behavior to handle errors loading included properties files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-756">CONFIGURATION-756</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump org.yaml:snakeyaml from 1.24 to 1.25. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-757">CONFIGURATION-757</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump tests from org.apache.commons:commons-dbcp2 2.6.0 to 2.7.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump tests from org.apache.commons:commons-pool2 2.6.2 to 2.7.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump commons-codec:commons-codec from 1.12 to 1.13. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-758">CONFIGURATION-758</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump tests from org.hsqldb:hsqldb 2.4.1 to 2.5.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump tests from com.sun.mail:mailapi 1.6.3 to 1.6.4. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Spring from 4.3.24.RELEASE to 4.3.25.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-759">CONFIGURATION-759</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Properties file using cyclical includes cause a StackOverflowError instead of detecting the misconfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-760">CONFIGURATION-760</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump maven-checkstyle-plugin from 3.0.0 to 3.1.0. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Use current version of Checkstyle: 6.18 to 8.24. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.5"></a>
<h2>Release 2.5 – 2019-05-23</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Allow user to specify the comments and separator chars. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-731">CONFIGURATION-731</a>. Thanks to Shuai Zhang, Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Jackson from 2.9.7 to 2.9.8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-738">CONFIGURATION-738</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Codec from 1.11 to 1.12. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-739">CONFIGURATION-739</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.2 to 2.3. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-740">CONFIGURATION-740</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Spring from 4.3.19 to 4.3.22. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-741">CONFIGURATION-741</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional library snakeyaml from 1.23 to 1.24. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-743">CONFIGURATION-743</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Lang from 3.8.1 to 3.9. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-747">CONFIGURATION-747</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Jackson from 2.9.8 to 2.9.9. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-746">CONFIGURATION-746</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Spring from 4.3.22 to 4.3.24. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-747">CONFIGURATION-747</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Add the special key "includeoptional" for properties files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-745">CONFIGURATION-745</a>. Thanks to Gary Gregory.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.4"></a>
<h2>Release 2.4 – 2018-10-23</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed numerous typos in user guides. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-710">CONFIGURATION-710</a>. Thanks to thc202.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Lang from 3.7 to 3.8.1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-711">CONFIGURATION-711</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>FileHandlerReloadingDetector now has a new refresh() method to
        initialize the reloading state from the underlying file. This new
        method is called by DefaultReloadingDetectorFactory when a new detector
        instance is created. This makes sure that a changed configuration file
        is directly detected on the first invocation of the
        isReloadingRequired() method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-712">CONFIGURATION-712</a>. Thanks to Rolland Hobbie.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Configuration properties can now be converted to regular expressions. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-713">CONFIGURATION-713</a>. Thanks to Lars W.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>With JupIOFactory a new IOFactory implementation is now available that
        implements handling of whitespace in a way closer to java.util.Properties.
        This class can be used when stricter compatibility with Java standard
        methods for reading and writing properties files is needed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-715">CONFIGURATION-715</a>. Thanks to Patrick Schmidt.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>JupIOFactory (introduced for CONFIGURATION-715) also implements
        handling of escape sequences in a way closer to java.util.Properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-716">CONFIGURATION-716</a>. Thanks to Patrick Schmidt.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replace use of deprecated Commons Lang string substitution code for Commons Text. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-720">CONFIGURATION-720</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Java requirement from version 7 to 8. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-694">CONFIGURATION-694</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Jackson from 2.9.6 to 2.9.7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-721">CONFIGURATION-721</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency snakeyaml from 1.21 to 1.23. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-722">CONFIGURATION-722</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional Spring dependencies from 4.3.18.RELEASE to 4.3.19.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-723">CONFIGURATION-723</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for Commons Text 1.4 localhost string lookup as a default lookup. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-724">CONFIGURATION-724</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Text from 1.4 to 1.5. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-725">CONFIGURATION-725</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add support for Commons Text 1.5 new string lookups as default lookups. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-726">CONFIGURATION-726</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>org.apache.commons.configuration2.DatabaseConfiguration never closes result sets and statements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-727">CONFIGURATION-727</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Text from 1.5 to 1.6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-728">CONFIGURATION-728</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.3"></a>
<h2>Release 2.3 – 2018-08-04</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Spring from 4.3.14.RELEASE to 4.3.18.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-707">CONFIGURATION-707</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency snakeyaml from 1.20 to 1.21. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-706">CONFIGURATION-706</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Jackson from 2.9.5 to 2.9.6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-705">CONFIGURATION-705</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Root node attributes are now updated correctly when loading XML
        configuration files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-652">CONFIGURATION-652</a>. Thanks to Claude Warren.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added a .gitignore file to the project. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-675">CONFIGURATION-675</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Codec from 1.10 to 1.11. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-678">CONFIGURATION-678</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Jackson from 2.8.9 to 2.9.3. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-679">CONFIGURATION-679</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Lang from 3.6 to 3.7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-680">CONFIGURATION-680</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.1 to 2.2. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-681">CONFIGURATION-681</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Snakeyaml from 1.18 to 1.19. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-682">CONFIGURATION-682</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency snakeyaml from 1.19 to 1.20. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-696">CONFIGURATION-696</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Spring from 4.3.9.RELEASE to 4.3.13.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-683">CONFIGURATION-683</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency Jackson from 2.9.3 to 2.9.5. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-695">CONFIGURATION-695</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency Spring from 4.3.13.RELEASE to 4.3.14.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-697">CONFIGURATION-697</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>JSONConfiguration can now handle list structures with complex objects
        as elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-686">CONFIGURATION-686</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a memory leak in CombinedConfigurationBuilder. Builder for the
        child sources were created each time a new result configuration was
        requested; thus the list with child builders got longer and longer.
        This also had an impact on reloading because unnecessary reloading
        operations could be triggered. Now it is guaranteed that child builders
        are created only once. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-687">CONFIGURATION-687</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug related to the handling of multiple include files in
        PropertiesConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-688">CONFIGURATION-688</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ExprLookup.getVariables() no longer returns null, but a copy of the
        current variables of this lookup object. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-690">CONFIGURATION-690</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ExprLookup now handles expressions that do not return a string result
        by converting them to string. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-691">CONFIGURATION-691</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ConversionExceptions thrown when accessing the properties of a
        configuration now contain the original cause of the exception. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-692">CONFIGURATION-692</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Configuration properties can now be converted to the data types File
        and Path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-693">CONFIGURATION-693</a>. Thanks to Lars W.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.MapConfiguration.toString(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-698">CONFIGURATION-698</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompositeConfiguration now supports an addConfigurationFirst() method
        to add child configurations with a higher priority. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-701">CONFIGURATION-701</a>. Thanks to Nicholas Verbeck.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now handles elements correctly whose value consists
        only of whitespace if the xml:space attribute is set to preserve. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-703">CONFIGURATION-703</a>. Thanks to Pascal Essiembre.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.2"></a>
<h2>Release 2.2 – 2017-10-12</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added an Automatic-Module-Name header to the manifest for compatibility
        with the Java 9 module system. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-673">CONFIGURATION-673</a>. Thanks to Andreas Kuhtz.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a NPE in INIConfiguration when saving a configuration with an
        empty section. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-671">CONFIGURATION-671</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The node model returned by SubnodeConfiguration.getNodeModel() has now
        the correct root node set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-670">CONFIGURATION-670</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional Spring dependency from 4.2.5.RELEASE to 4.3.9.RELEASE. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-669">CONFIGURATION-669</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons Lang from 3.3.2 to 3.6. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-667">CONFIGURATION-667</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add convenience ctor ConfigurationRuntimeException(String, Object...). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-666">CONFIGURATION-666</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add org.apache.commons.configuration2.AbstractHierarchicalConfiguration.toString(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-665">CONFIGURATION-665</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add API org.apache.commons.configuration2.tree.ImmutableNode.getChildren(String). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-664">CONFIGURATION-664</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a typo in the upgrade to 2.0 guide. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-663">CONFIGURATION-663</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump platform requirement from Java 6 to 7. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-661">CONFIGURATION-661</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add toString() methods here and there to help debugging. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-660">CONFIGURATION-660</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add API org.apache.commons.configuration2.DataConfiguration.getURI(String) methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-658">CONFIGURATION-658</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new YAMLConfiguration class to support configuration files in
        YAML format. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-656">CONFIGURATION-656</a>. Thanks to The Alchemist.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils and ConfigurationConverter now offer better support
        for immutable configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-653">CONFIGURATION-653</a>. Thanks to Vincent Maurin.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration can now be configured to use a custom separator
        between properties and values when writing an ini file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-647">CONFIGURATION-647</a>. Thanks to Vladimir Martinek.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added new JSONConfiguration class to support configuration files in
        JSON format. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-258">CONFIGURATION-258</a>. Thanks to The Alchemist.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.1.1"></a>
<h2>Release 2.1.1 – 2017-02-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved the handling of lists defined by a string with delimiter
        characters in XMLConfiguration. Such lists now retain their original
        format when the configuration is saved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-649">CONFIGURATION-649</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Made the IOFactory property of PropertiesBuilderParameter compatible
        with the most recent version of Commons BeanUtils. This version
        changed the handling of properties starting with multiple uppercase
        letters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-648">CONFIGURATION-648</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now works correctly with the auto-save mode. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-646">CONFIGURATION-646</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfigurationLayout no longer duplicates a header comment
        if a file with another comment is loaded. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-644">CONFIGURATION-644</a>. Thanks to Andrew DeMaria.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Documentation improvements for the user's guide. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-643">CONFIGURATION-643</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Improved documentation of FileBased interface. The Javadocs now state
        explicitly that the methods should not be called by client code.
        Exception handling in configuration classes implementing
        FileLocatorAware has been improved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-641">CONFIGURATION-641</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now correctly unescapes some special characters
        that are always escaped in Java properties files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-640">CONFIGURATION-640</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>In the OSGi bundle manifest of the Commons Configuration bundle the
        package imports for Spring packages are now marked as optional. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-639">CONFIGURATION-639</a>. Thanks to Rico Neubauer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved handling of temporary files and folders in unit tests. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-638">CONFIGURATION-638</a>. Thanks to Ahmet Celik.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated dependency to Commons BeanUtils to version 1.9.3. This fixes an
        issue with an exception stacktrace that was logged when a
        ConfigurationBuilder was used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-627">CONFIGURATION-627</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.1"></a>
<h2>Release 2.1 – 2016-08-20</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfigurationLayout now allows manipulating the order of keys
        when the properties file is written. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-636">CONFIGURATION-636</a>. Thanks to Tim Lark.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HomeDirectoryLocationStrategy now works correctly in the mode that
        evaluates the FileLocator's base path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-634">CONFIGURATION-634</a>. Thanks to Raviteja Lokineni.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Interpolation was improved to better support properties with multiple
        values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-633">CONFIGURATION-633</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The methods getStringArray() and getList() of CompositeConfiguration
        now support the interpolation of variables that reference properties
        with multiple values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-632">CONFIGURATION-632</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Support for the ant build was dropped. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-628">CONFIGURATION-628</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ImmutableConfiguration.getArray() has been deprecated. Arrays can now
        be queried using the generic get() method in a type-safe way. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-626">CONFIGURATION-626</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support Commons Configuration as PropertySource in Spring. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-624">CONFIGURATION-624</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--deki">deki</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a problem in INIConfiguration.write() with keys containing a
        separator character. This separator had been duplicated. Such keys
        are now handled correctly when the configuration is saved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-622">CONFIGURATION-622</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump Apache Commons VFS from 2.0 to 2.1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-631">CONFIGURATION-631</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Bump optional dependency Apache Commons Codec from 1.9 to 1.10. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-635">CONFIGURATION-635</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ggregory">ggregory</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.0"></a>
<h2>Release 2.0 – 2016-03-24</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Moved ConfigurationLogger class to io package to avoid cyclic
        dependencies between packages. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-621">CONFIGURATION-621</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed two invalid examples in the user's guide for file-based
        configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-620">CONFIGURATION-620</a>. Thanks to Mark Vedder.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CombinedConfigurationBuilder now supports inheritance of its parameters
        to child configuration sources. This is enabled by default. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-619">CONFIGURATION-619</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When using immutable configurations exceptions thrown by the wrapped
        configuration came out as UndeclaredThrowableException. This has been
        fixed; now the correct original exception is thrown. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-618">CONFIGURATION-618</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Changed generic types in the signatures of a MapConfiguration
        constructor and AbstractConfiguration.getList(String, List). These
        changes were made in version 1.10 as fixes for CONFIGURATION-557 and
        CONFIGURATION-558. But it had been missed to merge them to trunk. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-615">CONFIGURATION-615</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.0-beta2"></a>
<h2>Release 2.0-beta2 – 2015-12-05</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>References to Commons Logging have been removed from the Configuration
        API. It is still possible to influence logging by making use of the new
        ConfigurationLogger abstraction. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-614">CONFIGURATION-614</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The return type of ConfigurationBuilder.getConfiguration() was changed
        from Configuration to ImmutableConfiguration because this is the base
        interface for all configuration objects. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-612">CONFIGURATION-612</a>. Thanks to Jon Weygand.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in PropertiesConfiguration related to the loading of include
        files. The FileHandler used for this purpose was not fully initialized. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-609">CONFIGURATION-609</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Adapted the return type of ReloadingFileBasedConfigurationBuilder.configure(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-608">CONFIGURATION-608</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration no longer drops keys when list delimiter characters
        occur in element values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-605">CONFIGURATION-605</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a problem in the conversion of a flat configuration to a
        hierarchical one that could cause the loss of properties in a
        combined configuration constructed by an override combiner. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-604">CONFIGURATION-604</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.0-beta1"></a>
<h2>Release 2.0-beta1 – 2015-06-19</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed obsolete ConfigurationBuilder interface in the base package. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-598">CONFIGURATION-598</a>. Thanks to Bjarne Boström.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.0-alpha2"></a>
<h2>Release 2.0-alpha2 – 2014-12-20</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DefaultExpressionEngine can now be customized to match configuration
        keys in a case-insensitive manner. This is useful for instance for
        dealing with Windows INI files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-574">CONFIGURATION-574</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for querying encoded properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-565">CONFIGURATION-565</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now supports again properties without a value
        and a separator character. The keys of such properties are added to
        the configuration with an empty String as value. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-564">CONFIGURATION-564</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration can now save arrays in the correct form. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-427">CONFIGURATION-427</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A size() method was added to the ImmutableConfiguration interface. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-200">CONFIGURATION-200</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a2.0-alpha1"></a>
<h2>Release 2.0-alpha1 – 2014-09-23</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed methods from ConfigurationConverter related to ExtendedProperties.
        This class is no longer supported by recent versions of Commons
        Collections. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-591">CONFIGURATION-591</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed Serializable interface from all configuration implementations.
        Some configuration classes declared this interface without being
        actually serializable. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-590">CONFIGURATION-590</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The name of the top-level package and the maven coordinates have been
        changed to allow a coexistence of Commons Configuration 1.x with 2.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-588">CONFIGURATION-588</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The event mechanism has been reworked. There is now a generic event
        listener interface which can be used to receive notifications from
        multiple types of event sources. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-584">CONFIGURATION-584</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException in PropertiesConfigurationLayout
        which was caused by lines containing only whitespace. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-582">CONFIGURATION-582</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A migration guide has been created which supports when upgrading from
        version 1.x to 2.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-579">CONFIGURATION-579</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
