<td>The user's guide has been fully reworked to cover all new and enhanced
        features of version 2.0. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-578">CONFIGURATION-578</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to Commons Collections is no longer needed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-577">CONFIGURATION-577</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>A new abstract base class for hierarchical configurations was introduced
        which supports arbitrary hierarchical data structures. The type of the
        nodes used by the configuration can now be specified as a generic type
        argument. This makes the integration of other hierarchical structures
        easier. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-576">CONFIGURATION-576</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Hierarchical configurations now operate on immutable structures.
        Data is no longer represented by ConfigurationNode objects. The
        ImmutableNode class now serves as data container. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-575">CONFIGURATION-575</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XPathExpressionEngine can now deal with namespace prefixes in node and
        attribute names. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-573">CONFIGURATION-573</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When a CombinedConfiguration is cleared it removes itself as change
        listener from all child configurations. This fixes a possible memory
        leak. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-572">CONFIGURATION-572</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a possible ConcurrentModificationException when a SystemConfiguration
        instance is passed to the append() or copy() methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-570">CONFIGURATION-570</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLBeanDeclaration now escapes node names before they are used to
        determine nested properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-567">CONFIGURATION-567</a>. Thanks to Shen liang.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The DefaultExpressionEngine class is now immutable. An instance can be
        shared between multiple configuration objects. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-563">CONFIGURATION-563</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved the API of ExprLookup. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-562">CONFIGURATION-562</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to define default values for initialization
        properties of configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-559">CONFIGURATION-559</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in the handling of the xml:space attribute in
        XMLConfiguration. The attribute is now also applied to the current
        element, not only to sub elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-555">CONFIGURATION-555</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BeanHelper is no longer a static utility class. Instances can be
        created with a specific configuration of bean factories. There is still
        a default instance which can be obtained via the BeanHelper.INSTANCE
        field. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-554">CONFIGURATION-554</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The code for accessing configuration files hs been reworked. Methods
        related to locating configuration files have been moved from
        ConfigurationUtils to a new FileLocatorUtils class. Customizable
        strategy classes (implementing the new FileLocationStrategy) can be
        used for searching for configuration files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-553">CONFIGURATION-553</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The data type conversion mechanism has been made extensible. There is a
        new interface ConversionHandler which controls the data type conversions
        available for a configuration object. By setting a custom implementation,
        conversions can be adapted or extended. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-551">CONFIGURATION-551</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Conversion to Character is now supported. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-550">CONFIGURATION-550</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BeanHelper can now process BeanDefinitions initializing properties of
        collection types of their target beans. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-546">CONFIGURATION-546</a>. Thanks to Justin Couch.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Added missing dependencies to build.xml. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-544">CONFIGURATION-544</a>. Thanks to Oliver Kopp.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The mechanism for synchronizing configurations has been completely
        redesigned. It is now based on Synchronizer objects which can be
        configured by client code. A new chapter was added to the user's guide
        regarding thread-safety of configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-542">CONFIGURATION-542</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>MapConfiguration now directly uses a Properties object passed to its
        constructor as data store rather than copying it. This allows
        SystemConfiguration to be connected to system properties; i.e.
        changing a property through SystemConfiguration immediately affects
        the corresponding system property. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-540">CONFIGURATION-540</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Multi-file configurations are no longer restricted to XML configuration
        files. Arbitrary file-based configurations are now supported. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-541">CONFIGURATION-541</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The deprecated INIConfiguration class was removed.
        HierarchicalINIConfiguration was renamed to INIConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-539">CONFIGURATION-539</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The deprecated ConfigurationFactory class was removed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-537">CONFIGURATION-537</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>File-based configurations are now implemented in a different way.
        The interfaces FileConfiguration and ReloadingStrategy have been
        removed, also the base classes AbstractFileConfiguration and
        AbstractHierarchicalFileConfiguration. They are replaced by the
        FileBased interface and the FileHandler class which implements
        central I/O functionality. Reloading is now in the responsibility of
        configuration builders. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-536">CONFIGURATION-536</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration now provides get methods for querying its
        properties defining the underlying database structures. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-535">CONFIGURATION-535</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The includesAllowed property of PropertyConfiguration is now independent
        from the existence of a base path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-534">CONFIGURATION-534</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration now automatically converts CLOBs to strings if
        they appear in property values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-533">CONFIGURATION-533</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Concurrent access to configurations and reloading have been completely
        redesigned. Because reloading is now handled by configuration builders
        there is no need to acquire a lock in order to protected against a
        reload operations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-530">CONFIGURATION-530</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractConfiguration.clearPropertyDirect() is now abstract. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-527">CONFIGURATION-527</a>. Thanks to Matthias Richter.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertiesConfiguration now supports loading from and saving to DOM
        nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-526">CONFIGURATION-526</a>. Thanks to Oliver Kopp.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now keeps a comment at the bottom of a
        properties file. A new footer property was added for reading and
        writing this footer comment. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-525">CONFIGURATION-525</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Interpolation now works correctly after a configuration was cloned.
        The ConfigurationInterpolator instance is now cloned, too. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-524">CONFIGURATION-524</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils.fileFromUrl() now correctly handles URL containing
        encoded percent characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-521">CONFIGURATION-521</a>. Thanks to Oliver Kopp.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Support for reloading of configuration data has been reworked. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-520">CONFIGURATION-520</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Configuration objects are now created via configuration builders. A new
        API for configuration builders has been added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-519">CONFIGURATION-519</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Classes and interfaces related to interpolation have been slightly
        reworked. ConfigurationInterpolator is now thread-safe. There are
        multiple ways to define the ConfigurationInterpolator object to be
        used by an AbstractConfiguration instance. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-518">CONFIGURATION-518</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Hierarchical configurations now provide methods to obtain sub
        configurations for all child elements of a given key. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-517">CONFIGURATION-517</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration no longer escapes double quotes on saving. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-516">CONFIGURATION-516</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The visibility of some internal methods of PropertiesConfiguration.PropertiesWriter
        has been increased to protected. This simplifies the implementation of
        a custom escaping strategy. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-515">CONFIGURATION-515</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Bean declarations now support constructor invocations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-514">CONFIGURATION-514</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfiguration is now an interface. The base implementation
        class is named BaseHierarchicalConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-513">CONFIGURATION-513</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to obtain an immutable view on a Configuration or
        HierarchicalConfiguration object. New interfaces,
        ImmutableConfiguration, and ImmutableHierarchicalConfiguration have
        been introduced. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-512">CONFIGURATION-512</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Generic get() methods have been added to the Configuration interface.
        These methods expect a target class and try to convert the value of
        the specified property to this target class. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-508">CONFIGURATION-508</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed obsolete nested classes Node and NodeVisitor of
        HierarchicalConfiguration. The related deprecated class
        ConfigurationKey was removed, too. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-506">CONFIGURATION-506</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration no longer supports attributes with multiple values or
        list delimiter parsing in attributes. This feature was complex and
        error prone and brought little value to the user. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-505">CONFIGURATION-505</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>SubnodeConfiguration now provides a new method for clearing it and
        removing its root node from the parent configuration. The method
        HierarchicalConfiguration.configurationsAt() now returns a list
        of SubnodeConfiguration so that it is easier to make direct use of
        this feature. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-504">CONFIGURATION-504</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now adds attributes of elements defining a list to
        all list nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-500">CONFIGURATION-500</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Concurrent access to configurations and reloading have been completely
        redesigned. This should reduce the amount of synchronization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-496">CONFIGURATION-496</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Removed some static fields for specifying global default values.
        Using static fields in this way is thread-hostile. There are now
        alternatives for setting default values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-486">CONFIGURATION-486</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated dependency to Commons Lang from version 2.6 to 3.1. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-462">CONFIGURATION-462</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>EventSource is now an interface. With BaseEventSource there is a
        default implementation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-419">CONFIGURATION-419</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The handling of list delimiters and their escape characters has been
        reworked. A new ListDelimiterHandler interface was introduced allowing
        applications to customize the treatment of list delimiters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-418">CONFIGURATION-418</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Concurrent access to configurations has been reworked. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-330">CONFIGURATION-330</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>With the new reloading mechanism automatic and periodic reloading checks
        can be performed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-204">CONFIGURATION-204</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Reloading checks can now be performed in a background thread. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-202">CONFIGURATION-202</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to define the strategy used for locating
        configuration files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-153">CONFIGURATION-153</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Reloading can no longer corrupt a configuration instance. This is now
        handled by a configuration builder; the original configuration instance
        is not modified. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-136">CONFIGURATION-136</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>It is now possible to influence the conversion from a container object
        (a collection or an array) to a single value (e.g. what is returned by
        getString() if the current property has multiple values). Per default,
        the first value is returned. By overriding methods of the
        configuration's ConversionHandler, this behavior can be changed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-26">CONFIGURATION-26</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.10"></a>
<h2>Release 1.10 – 2013-10-27</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now adds attributes of elements defining a list to
        all list nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-500">CONFIGURATION-500</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now keeps a comment at the bottom of a
        properties file. A new footer property was added for reading and
        writing this footer comment. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-525">CONFIGURATION-525</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertiesConfiguration now supports loading from and saving to DOM
        nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-526">CONFIGURATION-526</a>. Thanks to Oliver Kopp.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The includesAllowed property of PropertyConfiguration is now independent
        from the existence of a base path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-534">CONFIGURATION-534</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>BeanHelper can now process BeanDefinitions initializing properties of
        collection types of their target beans. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-546">CONFIGURATION-546</a>. Thanks to Justin Couch.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Conversion to Character is now supported. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-550">CONFIGURATION-550</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in the handling of the xml:space attribute in
        XMLConfiguration. The attribute is now also applied to the current
        element, not only to sub elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-555">CONFIGURATION-555</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>In 1.7 and before, any change to the system properties was
        immediately reflected in a SystemConfiguration object. This
        behavior broke in 1.8 and 1.9. This has been fixed for 1.10. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-556">CONFIGURATION-556</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--henning">henning</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>In 1.7 and before, it was possible to pass an arbitrary Map
        into the constructor of MapConfiguration. With the
        generification in 1.8, this actually broke and it was no
        longer possible to pass in e.g. a Map&lt;String, String&gt;
        because the signature now required a Map&lt;String,
        Object&gt;. Changing the constructor to accept a
        Map&lt;String, ?&gt; restores this. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-557">CONFIGURATION-557</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--henning">henning</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Similar to CONFIGURATION-557, the getList(String, List) method
        was generified to be getList(String, List&lt;Object&gt;) but
        needs to be getList(String, List&lt;?&gt;) so that code that
        used a more specific list (such as a List&lt;String&gt;) still
        compiles against the new API. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-558">CONFIGURATION-558</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--henning">henning</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.9"></a>
<h2>Release 1.9 – 2012-08-22</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Small changes in user guide documentation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-503">CONFIGURATION-503</a>. Thanks to Tino Sino.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improvements of basic features and AbstractConfiguration documentation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-502">CONFIGURATION-502</a>. Thanks to Tino Sino.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration no longer swallows exception caused by
        invalid date properties. Now a warning message is logged. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-501">CONFIGURATION-501</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>List properties can now be set correctly on a HierarchicalConfiguration
        if delimiter parsing is disabled. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-495">CONFIGURATION-495</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Made static DateFormat fields in XMLPropertyListConfiguration.PListNode
        final and added a note about proper synchronization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-488">CONFIGURATION-488</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DataConfiguration.get() now also works with String properties and if no
        data type conversion is required. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-487">CONFIGURATION-487</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration now always closes the result set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-483">CONFIGURATION-483</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The Import-Package section in the OSGi manifest now uses the
        resolution:=optional directive for optional dependencies. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-482">CONFIGURATION-482</a>. Thanks to Chris Seieroe.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Variable substitution in configuration sources declared in a definition
        file for DefaultConfigurationBuilder now works across multiple sources. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-481">CONFIGURATION-481</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertyListConfiguration now can deal with C-style comments in plist
        configuration files. Both block and single-line comments are supported. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-477">CONFIGURATION-477</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.8"></a>
<h2>Release 1.8 – 2012-02-04</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed possible ClassCastExceptions in CompositeConfiguration related to
        special in-memory configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-476">CONFIGURATION-476</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Class ConfigurationKey was deprecated in favor of DefaultConfigurationKey. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-475">CONFIGURATION-475</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Implemented delimiter parsing in HierarchicalINIConfiguration to be
        consistent with other Configuration implementations. Note that this can
        impact existing code. To switch back to the old behavior, call
        setDelimiterParsingDisabled(true) before loading the configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-474">CONFIGURATION-474</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>CompositeConfiguration now provides better support for child
        configurations that are used as in-memory configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-471">CONFIGURATION-471</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Classes generated by JavaCC are now created dynamically during the
        build process. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-470">CONFIGURATION-470</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now requires Java 5 or later.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Binary literals are now supported (i.e Ob11010001). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-466">CONFIGURATION-466</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated the dependency to Commons Jexl to version 2.1.1. This version
        provides correct OSGi manifest headers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-465">CONFIGURATION-465</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved documentation of AbstractFileConfiguration related to load()
        methods and their impact on the base path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-463">CONFIGURATION-463</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The project now uses standard Maven directory layout. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-461">CONFIGURATION-461</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.7"></a>
<h2>Release 1.7 – 2011-09-07</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Reloading now also works for configuration sources declared in the
        additional section of a configuration definition file for
        DefaultConfigurationBuilder. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-460">CONFIGURATION-460</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationFactory has been deprecated. The user guide was updated to
        no more mention this class. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-459">CONFIGURATION-459</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfiguration now provides a specific implementation of the
        clear() method. This is more efficient and also solves some other
        problems related to clearing a SubnodeConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-458">CONFIGURATION-458</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improved Javadocs of getKeys(String) method for some configuration
        classes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-456">CONFIGURATION-456</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalINIConfiguration.getSection() now creates a section if it
        does not exist. The SubnodeConfiguration returned by this method is now
        always connected to the parent ini configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-455">CONFIGURATION-455</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XPathExpressionEngine now provides better support for the setProperty()
        method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-452">CONFIGURATION-452</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The parsing of ini files has been improved for property definitions
        containing multiple separator characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-448">CONFIGURATION-448</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DefaultConfigurationBuilder now supports including environment properties
        using the "env" tag. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-447">CONFIGURATION-447</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now handles attributes correctly whose value is an
        empty string. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-446">CONFIGURATION-446</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Transforming a CombinedConfiguration with ViewNodes to an
        XMLConfiguration could cause problems with attributes. This has been
        fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-445">CONFIGURATION-445</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Child configuration builders created for a &lt;configuration&gt; element
        in a configuration definition file now inherit the configuration and
        error listeners from the original DefaultConfigurationBuilder. This
        makes it possible to suppress log output created for optional
        configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-439">CONFIGURATION-439</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>JNDIConfiguration.getKeys() no more logs an exception if the prefix does
        not exist. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-438">CONFIGURATION-438</a>. Thanks to Mike Noordermeer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Child configuration builders created for a &lt;configuration&gt; element
        in a configuration definition file now inherit some of their properties
        from the builder object which processed the file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-437">CONFIGURATION-437</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The optional dependency to Apache Ant has been changed to the new
        groupId org.apache.ant. The version was updated to the most recent
        version 1.8.2 (older versions should still work). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-436">CONFIGURATION-436</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalINIConfiguration now recognizes comment characters in
        property definitions only if they are preceded by whitespace. Thus
        comment characters can now be part of the property value. This is for
        instance required for the definition of file paths which use the
        semicolon as path separator. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-434">CONFIGURATION-434</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Minor improvements of the support for indexed properties in
        ConfigurationDynaBean. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-433">CONFIGURATION-433</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The methods getList() and getStringArray() of AbstractConfiguration can
        now handle single-valued properties of primitive types. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-432">CONFIGURATION-432</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration no longer escapes backslashs in the values of
        XML elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-428">CONFIGURATION-428</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalINIConfiguration now works correctly with configurations
        that contain only properties in the global section. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-424">CONFIGURATION-424</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>testFromClassPath() can fail when it should not because of inconsistent escaping of output from
        PropertiesConfiguration.getURL() and FileChangedReloadingStrategy.getFile().toURL(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-423">CONFIGURATION-423</a>. Thanks to William Buckley.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>A bug related to the interpretation of escape sequences for backslashes
        has been fixed. The user guide has also been improved in this area. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-418">CONFIGURATION-418</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Files with a plus character in their names are now handled correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-415">CONFIGURATION-415</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SubsetConfiguration now produces correct events. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-413">CONFIGURATION-413</a>. Thanks to Alexander Prishchepov.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration can now be instructed to perform a commit after an
        update of the managed database table. This makes it usable in
        environments where the connections do not use auto-commit mode. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-412">CONFIGURATION-412</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a refresh() method to AbstractFileConfiguration and
        AbstractHierarchicalFileConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-410">CONFIGURATION-410</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalINIConfiguration now correctly saves sections whose name
        contains delimiter characters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-409">CONFIGURATION-409</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration.save() escaped slashes in properties values.
        This was caused by a bug in commons-lang 2.4. Updating to the new
        version commons-lang 2.5 fixed this problem. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-408">CONFIGURATION-408</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a potential IllegalStateException in HierarchicalINIConfiguration
        that can be thrown when the global section is requested concurrently. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-407">CONFIGURATION-407</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration no longer throws a ConfigurationException
        if the file to be loaded does not have an outer dict element. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-405">CONFIGURATION-405</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The default expression engine used by hierarchical configurations used to
        throw a NumberFormatException if invalid indices were used in property
        keys. This has been fixed. As a side effect brackets can now be used in
        property keys. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-404">CONFIGURATION-404</a>. Thanks to Rob Walker.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When an empty XMLConfiguration was saved and reloaded the root element
        was assigned an empty text value. Because of this isEmpty() returned
        false for this configuration. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-403">CONFIGURATION-403</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Default variable interpolation now supports the env: prefix for
        referencing environment variables. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-399">CONFIGURATION-399</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Schema violation exceptions are now propagated back to the caller. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-397">CONFIGURATION-397</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration and CombinedConfiguraton are now synchronized to fix problems
        caused by reloading in a multithreaded environment. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-390">CONFIGURATION-390</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfiguration.NodeVisitor is now passed the correct key to
        its visitAfterChildren() method. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-396">CONFIGURATION-396</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>BaseConfiguration.clone() now also clones collections stored in the
        internal map. This causes list properties to be handled correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-393">CONFIGURATION-393</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DefaultConfigurationBuilder now supports defining ini files in its
        configuration definition file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-389">CONFIGURATION-389</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Attribute or element values will not be escaped when attribute or element splitting are disabled. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-388">CONFIGURATION-388</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>When using Commons Lang 2.6 or higher as dependency nested interpolation
        in variable names is supported. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-363">CONFIGURATION-363</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Empty dictionaries in a PropertyList configuration are now preserved when the configuration is saved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-362">CONFIGURATION-362</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration now generates correct events for the clear() and
        clearProperty() methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-385">CONFIGURATION-385</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Add ExprLookup to allow expressions to be evaluated in configurations. When
        used, this requires that Apache Commons Jexl be added as a dependency to
        projects using Commons Configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-380">CONFIGURATION-380</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>MapConfiguration now provides a way of controlling the trimming
        behavior. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-374">CONFIGURATION-374</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added MergeCombiner to allow elements in two configurations to be merged when the
        element and attributes in the first file match those in the second file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-378">CONFIGURATION-378</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>File system access has been abstracted to a FileSystem interface. Two implementations
        are provided, DefaultFileSystem that behaves in a backward compatible manner and
        VFSFileSystem which uses Commons VFS to retreive and store files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-340">CONFIGURATION-340</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfigurationLayout now allows setting the line separator to
        be used when writing the properties file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-314">CONFIGURATION-314</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfigurationLayout now also stores the property separators used for
        the single properties. It is also possible to change them for specific
        properties or set a global properties separator. In earlier versions
        the separator was hard-coded to " = ". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-371">CONFIGURATION-371</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now defines a nested interface IOFactory. Using
        this interface it is possible to inject custom PropertiesReader and
        PropertiesWriter implementations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-370">CONFIGURATION-370</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SubnodeConfiguration now fires an event of type EVENT_SUBNODE_CHANGED
        if a structural change of the parent configuration was detected. If the
        SubnodeConfiguration is contained in a CombinedConfiguration, the
        CombinedConfiguration receives this event and can update itself. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-368">CONFIGURATION-368</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>MultiFileHierarchicalConfiguration was not using basepath to
        construct the file url. It also threw an exception if the
        file pattern resolved to a non-existent file. This is now
        configurable. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-361">CONFIGURATION-361</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Align interpolation functionality of SubnodeConfiguration and
        SubsetConfiguration. SubsetConfiguration will now also interpolate
        keys of the parent configuration or use the local lookups of its
        parent. SubnodeConfiguration is in turn now able to lookup local
        keys as well. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-375">CONFIGURATION-375</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--joehni">joehni</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Align interpolation functionality of SubnodeConfiguration and
        SubsetConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-376">CONFIGURATION-376</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--joehni">joehni</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Align interpolation functionality of SubnodeConfiguration and
        SubsetConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-377">CONFIGURATION-377</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--joehni">joehni</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SubsetConfiguration did not use locally registered lookups of its
        interpolator. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-369">CONFIGURATION-369</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--joehni">joehni</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed broken links to the API documentation in the user's guide. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-359">CONFIGURATION-359</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Improvements of the user's guide for hierarchical configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-358">CONFIGURATION-358</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The message of the ConversionException thrown by
        AbstractConfiguration.getBigInteger() is now correct. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-357">CONFIGURATION-357</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added getConfigurations and getConfigurationNameList. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-356">CONFIGURATION-356</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow configurations to be validated using XML Schemas. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-257">CONFIGURATION-257</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow configurations to be validated using XML Schemas. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-355">CONFIGURATION-355</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.6"></a>
<h2>Release 1.6 – 2008-12-25</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Some dependencies to other Commons components have been updated to the
        recent versions. Affected are Commons Lang, Commons Collections,
        Commons Logging, Commons BeanUtils, and Commons JXPath. The older
        versions should still work.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow system properties to be set from a configuration file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-353">CONFIGURATION-353</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow variable resolvers to be defined configured in
        DefaultConfigurationBuilder. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-351">CONFIGURATION-351</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added MultiFileHierarchicalConfiguration, DynamicCombinedConfiguration
        and PatternSubtreeConfigurationWrapper. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-350">CONFIGURATION-350</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--rgoers">rgoers</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The visibility of DefaultConfigurationBuilder.XMLConfigurationProvider
        was changed from package local to public. This makes it easier to
        implement providers that create configuration classes derived from
        XMLConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-349">CONFIGURATION-349</a>. Thanks to Ralph Goers.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>AbstractHierarchicalFileConfiguration.getKeys() now also checks whether
        a reload is required. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-348">CONFIGURATION-348</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>AbstractFileConfiguration.getKeys() now returns an iterator that points
        to a snapshot of the keys of the configuration. This prevents
        ConcurrentModificationExceptions during iteration when a reload is
        performed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-347">CONFIGURATION-347</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils.convertToHierarchical() now creates multiple
        configuration nodes for properties with multiple values. This
        improves compatibility with queries. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-346">CONFIGURATION-346</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now per default uses the encoding "ISO-8859-1"
        for loading properties files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-345">CONFIGURATION-345</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CombinedConfiguration could cause a deadlock when it was accessed while
        concurrently a reload of one of its child configuration happened. This
        was fixed by reducing synchronization where it is not strictly
        necessary. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-344">CONFIGURATION-344</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The "force reload check" mechanism of CombinedConfiguration now also
        works with sub configurations created by configurationAt(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-341">CONFIGURATION-341</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When performing interpolation the methods getList() and getStringArray()
        of CompositeConfiguration did not take the order of child configurations
        into account. This could lead to wrong interpolated values when the key
        was contained in multiple child configuration. Interpolation is now
        always done in the correct order. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-339">CONFIGURATION-339</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now also performs interpolation when searching
        for include files. This means that the name of a file to include can be
        determined by another property. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-338">CONFIGURATION-338</a>. Thanks to David Donn.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DefaultConfigurationBuilder now supports defining new configuration
        providers in the configuration definition file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-337">CONFIGURATION-337</a>. Thanks to Ralph Goers.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>When converting a flat configuration to a hierarchical one it is now
        possible to specify the expression engine to be used for this purpose.
        This may be necessary if the flat configuration contains keys with
        special characters interpreted by the expression engine.
        CombinedConfiguration defines the new setConversionExpressionEngine()
        method. The expression engine passed to this method will be used when
        converting flat child configurations to hierarchical ones. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-336">CONFIGURATION-336</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now allows disabling the attribute splitting mechanism
        introduced in the 1.5 release (as part of the fix for CONFIGURATION-268).
        This may be necessary for correctly processing attributes containing
        both the list delimiter and the attribute delimiter character. The new
        property "disableAttributeSplitting" was added for this
        purpose. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-335">CONFIGURATION-335</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Made handling of parent nodes more consistent when setRoot() or
        setRootNode() of HierarchicalConfiguration are involved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-334">CONFIGURATION-334</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Properties written through a DataConfiguration to a wrapped
        PropertiesConfiguration got lost when the PropertiesConfiguration was
        saved. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-332">CONFIGURATION-332</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XMLBeanDeclaration now defines a factory method createBeanDeclaration()
        for creating the declarations for complex nested properties. This
        method can be overridden by derived classes for injecting custom
        BeanDeclaration implementations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-331">CONFIGURATION-331</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>A bug in XMLConfiguration.addNodes() made it impossible to add
        attribute nodes using this method. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-328">CONFIGURATION-328</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration misinterpreted variables in the global section with
        a dot in their name as section names. HierarchicalINIConfiguration fixes
        this problem. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-327">CONFIGURATION-327</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration does not support obtaining a subset for the global
        section. HierarchicalINIConfiguration provides the getSection() method
        that returns the content of the global section if null is passed in as
        section name. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-326">CONFIGURATION-326</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration does not return the global section in its getSections()
        method. HierarchicalINIConfiguration fixes this problem. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-325">CONFIGURATION-325</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalINIConfiguration adds support for line continuation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-324">CONFIGURATION-324</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration has been deprecated. Its functionality is now available
        through the new HierarchicalINIConfiguration class.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>With HierarchicalINIConfiguration a complete new Configuration
        implementation for parsing Windows INI files is available. This new
        class is a full replacement of INIConfiguration and addresses some of its
        shortcomings. Being derived from HierarchicalConfiguration it offers
        the enhanced functionality of hierarchical configurations.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationDynaBean now works properly with indexed properties
        stored internally in the underlying configuration as arrays. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-322">CONFIGURATION-322</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The iterator returned by HierarchicalConfiguration.getKeys(String prefix)
        now also contains the prefix if this key is contained in the
        configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-321">CONFIGURATION-321</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration is no longer limited to 32 bits integers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-320">CONFIGURATION-320</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>When an XMLConfiguration is created using the copy constructor, the name
        of the root element is now preserved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-318">CONFIGURATION-318</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Changing the text of the root element of an XMLConfiguration had no
        effect when the configuration was saved. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-316">CONFIGURATION-316</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>CombinedConfiguration used to send two EVENT_COMBINED_INVALIDATE events
        for each modified child configuration. Now this event is sent only
        once after the affected child configuration was updated. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-315">CONFIGURATION-315</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now supports the xml:space attribute. This attribute
        can be used to preserve whitespace in the content of XML elements. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-307">CONFIGURATION-307</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration now preserves whitespace in quoted values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-306">CONFIGURATION-306</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>If a change has been detected by FileChangedReloadingStrategy, the
        reloadingRequired() method will now return true until
        reloadingPerformed() has been called. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-302">CONFIGURATION-302</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a NullPointerException that could be thrown under certain
        circumstances when saving an XMLConfiguration that was created using
        the constructor that takes a HierarchicalConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-301">CONFIGURATION-301</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Instantiating an XMLPropertyListConfiguration no longer fails
        if the DTD is missing from the classpath. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-309">CONFIGURATION-309</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>It's now possible to read a configuration file containing
        a '#' in its name (requires Java 1.4 or above). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-300">CONFIGURATION-300</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed the date format for XMLPropertyListConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-260">CONFIGURATION-260</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.5"></a>
<h2>Release 1.5 – 2007-11-24</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Some of the dependencies in the m2 pom have been updated to be more
        consistent. Thanks to Jörg Schaible.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to commons-logging was updated to the current version
        1.1. Older versions of commons-logging will still work. Thanks to Jörg Schaible.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new method interpolatedConfiguration() was added to AbstractConfiguration.
        This method returns a configuration with the same type and
        content as the original configuration, however all variables have been
        resolved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-273">CONFIGURATION-273</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Resolving of variables with the prefix const (constant fields) caused
        a ClassCastException under certain circumstances if non-String fields
        were involved. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-299">CONFIGURATION-299</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependencies to commons-codec and commons-jxpath have been marked
        as optional. They are not required by the core classes. Thanks to Nicolas De Loof.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>There is a new configuration implementation EnvironmentConfiguration,
        which provides access to (OS) environment variables. On Java &gt;= 1.5
        this class can be directly used; on earlier versions a dependency to ant
        is required. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-284">CONFIGURATION-284</a>. Thanks to Nicolas De Loof.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>A bug in XMLConfiguration caused that attributes of the root element
        could not be changed. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-296">CONFIGURATION-296</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new method registerEntityId() was added to XMLConfiguration, which
        allows to register URLs for entities. A new default implementation of
        the EntityResolver interface handles these entities automatically. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-290">CONFIGURATION-290</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The subset() method of HierarchicalConfiguration now takes the value of
        the subset's root node into account if it is not ambigous. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-295">CONFIGURATION-295</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Nodes added to a XMLConfiguration using the addNodes() method could
        lose their value when the configuration was saved. This is now fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-294">CONFIGURATION-294</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>New copy() and append() methods have been added to AbstractConfiguration.
        They replace the methods with the same names in ConfigurationUtils,
        which do not handle all features of AbstractConfiguration properly (e.g.
        list delimiters in property values are incorrectly treated). To avoid
        such problems, the new methods should be used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-272">CONFIGURATION-272</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The addNodes() method of hierarchical file-based configurations now
        correctly triggers an auto save. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-291">CONFIGURATION-291</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfiguration.addNodes() now resets the reference property
