        of all nodes to be added. This fixes a problem with XMLConfiguration,
        which now detects the added nodes as new and treats them correctly when
        the configuration is saved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-287">CONFIGURATION-287</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DefaultConfigurationBuilder will now notify registered error listeners
        about optional configuration sources that could not be created. Before
        exceptions thrown by optional configurations were swallowed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-285">CONFIGURATION-285</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils.convertToHierarchical() now correctly deals with
        property values containing escaped list delimiters. This also affects
        CombinedConfiguration when sub configurations with such property values
        are contained. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-283">CONFIGURATION-283</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>AbstractConfiguration.addProperty() now correctly deals with list and
        array properties if delimiter parsing is disabled. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-275">CONFIGURATION-275</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The default expression engine used by HierarchicalConfiguration
        instances is now lazily initialized. This avoids NullPointerExceptions
        in certain server environments after a redeploy. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-282">CONFIGURATION-282</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Cycles in the JNDI tree no longer cause a stack overflow in
        JNDIConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-281">CONFIGURATION-281</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The base implementation of clear() in AbstractConfiguration now checks
        for a potential UnsupportedOperationException when iterating over the
        existing properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-277">CONFIGURATION-277</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Using file-based configurations in auto-save mode together with a
        reloading strategy could cause data loss. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-280">CONFIGURATION-280</a>. Thanks to Roman Kurmanowytsch.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>A PropertiesConfiguration that was created from a non existing file
        lost its content when it was saved. This problem has been solved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-279">CONFIGURATION-279</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new getSource() method was added to CompositeConfiguration and
        CombinedConfiguration, which returns the child configuration, in which
        a given property is defined. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-215">CONFIGURATION-215</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now supports escaping the escape character for
        list delimiters. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-274">CONFIGURATION-274</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration no longer escapes the list delimiter on saving
        if the list delimiter has been disabled. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-269">CONFIGURATION-269</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>List properties and properties containing interpolated variables
        are now properly saved by INIConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-270">CONFIGURATION-270</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>When delimiter parsing was disabled for XMLConfiguration, saving and
        loading the configuration accidently added escape characters to properties
        containing the list delimiter character. This has been fixed. It is now
        also possible to escape the escape character itself. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-268">CONFIGURATION-268</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The return value of FileConfiguration.getFile() is now always
        consistent with the result of getURL(). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-253">CONFIGURATION-253</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration uses the platform's specific line separator instead
        of the Windows line separator.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>INIConfiguration flushes the output at the end of a save operation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-267">CONFIGURATION-267</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>For hierarchical file-based configurations the auto-save mechanism is
        now also triggered if a subnode configuration is changed. In such a case
        the new event type EVENT_SUBNODE_CHANGED will be sent to registered
        listeners. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-265">CONFIGURATION-265</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationInterpolator now also invokes the default lookup object for
        variables with a prefix that could not be resolved by their associated
        lookup object. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-266">CONFIGURATION-266</a>. Thanks to Tobias Noebel.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A SubnodeConfiguration per default does not see certain changes of its
        parent configuration (e.g. reloads). With a new boolean parameter of
        HierarchicalConfiguration's configurationAt() method a mode can be
        enabled, in which the subnode configuration checks for such changes and
        reconstructs itself if necessary. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-264">CONFIGURATION-264</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>byte[] properties are properly saved as data fields in the plist
        configurations (PropertyListConfiguration and XMLPropertyListConfiguration).</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>DataConfiguration now supports java.net.InetAddress,
        javax.mail.internet.InternetAddress, and Java 5 enumeration types.
        Properties are converted to these types using the new generic getters.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The object getters in DataConfiguration with no default value
        (i.e getURL(key)) now throw a NoSuchElementException if the flag
        throwExceptionOnMissing is set.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Generic get methods have been added to DataConfiguration (get(),
        getArray() and getList())</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration used to drop attributes when an element's value was a
        list. This has been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-263">CONFIGURATION-263</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>File configurations can now be saved to FTP URLs, or any other URL
        protocol supporting data output. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-249">CONFIGURATION-249</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a potential issue in DatabaseConfiguration where an error on
        closing a statement would prevent the connection from being closed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-180">CONFIGURATION-180</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Date objects are now supported in ASCII plist files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-261">CONFIGURATION-261</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertyListConfiguration no longer requires commons-digester and
        commons-beanutils to work.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed INIConfiguration to handle the quoted values and the lines
        containing a value and a comment.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.4"></a>
<h2>Release 1.4 – 2007-04-08</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>MapConfiguration and the web-based configurations now treat strings
        that contain an escaped list delimiter correctly: The escape character
        will be removed, so that for instance "foo\,bar" becomes "foo,bar". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-256">CONFIGURATION-256</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration now handles list delimiters in property values
        correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-255">CONFIGURATION-255</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>After cloning a XMLConfiguration there was still a connection to the
        original configuration. So when the clone was modified and then saved
        the content of the original configuration was written. This has now
        been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-254">CONFIGURATION-254</a>. Thanks to Carsten Kaiser.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Class loading in BeanHelper is now done using ClassUtils of Commons
        Lang.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>With ManagedReloadingStrategy a new reloading strategy for file-based
        configurations was added that can be triggered through JMX. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-237">CONFIGURATION-237</a>. Thanks to Nicolas de Loof.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependencies to Commons Lang, Commons Collections, and Commons Digester
        are updated to use the recent available version. However older versions
        will still work.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A pom for maven 2 was added.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils.getFile() now always checks first whether the passed
        in file name is absolute. If it is, this file will be returned. This
        prevents that on Unix under certain circumstances absolute file names
        are interpreted as relative ones. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-252">CONFIGURATION-252</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to xml-apis was changed to the version 1.0.b2. The so
        far used version 2.0.2 is reported to be bogus. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-251">CONFIGURATION-251</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>In addition to configuration event listeners now so-called configuration
        error listeners are supported. These listeners are notified about
        internal errors that had been logged and swallowed by privious versions.
        The new enableRuntimeExceptions() method of ConfigurationUtils
        registers a special error listener at the passed in configuration that
        generates a runtime exception when an error event is received. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-245">CONFIGURATION-245</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>AbstractConfiguration now allows to set an instance specific logger
        using the setLogger() method. This gives clients more control over a
        configuration's logging behavior.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>SubsetConfiguration and CompositeConfiguration were updated to fully
        support an instance specific list delimiter. Concerning splitting of
        string properties that contain a list delimiter character, these
        classes now behave like a "normal" configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-155">CONFIGURATION-155</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Variable interpolation features have been improved. A variable can now
        have the form ${prefix:variableName} where the prefix
        defines the type of the variable. The standard types sys for
        system properties and const for constants are supported.
        Variables without a prefix are treated as references to other
        configuration properties (which is compatible to earlier versions). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-192">CONFIGURATION-192</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now depends on Commons Lang 2.2. Some features
        of Lang's new text package are used.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The number of dependencies needed for DefaultConfigurationBuilder was
        reduced by letting some of the default configuration providers resolve
        their classes per reflection. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-244">CONFIGURATION-244</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>File-based configurations with a reloading strategy did not work well
        together with CombinedConfiguration because the reloading strategy is
        only checked when its associated configuration is accessed (which does
        not happen when only the combined configuration is queried).
        As a workaround CombinedConfiguration now provides the boolean
        forceReloadCheck property. If this is set to true, all contained
        configurations will be triggered when a property is queried. This will
        cause a reload if necessary. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-240">CONFIGURATION-240</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Configuration declarations in the configuration definition file for
        DefaultConfigurationBuilder that are marked as optional now support a
        new attribute config-forceCreate. If this attribute is set
        to true and the initialization of the configuration fails,
        DefaultConfigurationBuilder tries to add an empty configuration of the
        correct type to the resulting combined configuration. Before this
        change optional configurations that caused errors were never added to
        the combined configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-243">CONFIGURATION-243</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>CompositeConfiguration.clearProperty() now generates the correct
        update events. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-241">CONFIGURATION-241</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The configuration returned by HierarchicalConfiguration.subset()
        performed variable interpolation only in the keys that belong to the
        subset. Now the parent configuration is searched, too, to resolve the
        value of the referenced property. This is consistent with the way
        SubnodeConfiguration works. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-242">CONFIGURATION-242</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>DefaultConfigurationBuilder now internally uses the standard expression
        engine for hierarchical configurations. So the dependency to Commons
        JXPath is no more needed when this class is used. Note that this change
        has some impact on existing code that manually sets properties before
        the combined configuration is created; this code must now be adapted to
        the changed syntax of property keys. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-234">CONFIGURATION-234</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfiguration and some of its sub classes now define a
        copy constructor. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-236">CONFIGURATION-236</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new configuration class for windows ini files was added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-197">CONFIGURATION-197</a>. Thanks to Trevor Charles Miller.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>For file-based configurations loaded by ConfigurationFactory the load()
        method was called before all of the properties specified by attributes
        of the XML element have been initialized. Now load() is called after
        property initialization. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-229">CONFIGURATION-229</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Interpolation of non string values did not work when SubsetConfiguration
        was involved. This has now been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-235">CONFIGURATION-235</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The compatibility of ConfigurationDynaBean with other configuration types
        than those that inherit from BaseConfiguration was improved. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-227">CONFIGURATION-227</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The getList() method of CompositeConfiguration does now fully support
        variable interpolation. So it is possible to refer to a variable in
        one (sub) configuration that is defined in another configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-233">CONFIGURATION-233</a>. Thanks to Rainer Jung.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XPathExpressionEngine used to create wrong keys for attribute nodes.
        This caused some operations on XMLConfiguration to fail when such an
        expression engine was set (e.g. reloading). Now correct keys for
        attributes are constructed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-230">CONFIGURATION-230</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Some of the methods of file-based hierarchical configurations (e.g.
        subset() or configurationAt()) did not take an eventually set reloading
        strategy into account. This is now fixed by overriding the internal
        fetchNodeList() method in AbstractHierarchicalFileConfiguration and
        letting it always check for a reload. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-228">CONFIGURATION-228</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.3"></a>
<h2>Release 1.3 – 2006-09-24</h2>
<p>No changes in this release.</p></section><section><a id="a1.3-rc2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.3-rc2 – 2006-09-03</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractFileConfiguration now overrides addProperty() and setProperty()
        instead of addPropertyDirect() to implement the auto save feature.
        This was necessary to properly integrate PropertiesConfigurationLayout.
        It has also the advantage that an auto save is triggered only once if
        multi-valued properties are involved (before a save operation was
        performed for each property value). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-223">CONFIGURATION-223</a>. Thanks to Gabriele Garuglieri.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The new PropertiesConfigurationLayout class broke the save() operation
        of PropertiesConfiguration when an instance was newly created and
        populated in memory. This is fixed now by ensuring that a layout object
        is immediately created and registered as event listener at the
        configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-222">CONFIGURATION-222</a>. Thanks to Gabriele Garuglieri.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationFactory now supports variables in its configuration
        definition files. These variables are resolved using system properties
        and have the typical ${} syntax. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-221">CONFIGURATION-221</a>. Thanks to Rainer Jung.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>There were still some problems with resolving relative paths when
        configuration files are loaded from classpath. This fix addresses these
        issues. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-216">CONFIGURATION-216</a>. Thanks to Gabriele Garuglieri.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>DataConfiguration.getDateArray() used to ignore the format argument.
        This was fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-220">CONFIGURATION-220</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now defines its own clone() method to handle
        the associated PropertiesConfigurationLayout object correctly. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-219">CONFIGURATION-219</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.3-rc1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.3-rc1 – 2006-07-30</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to servletapi was updated from version 2.3 to version
        2.4, but version 2.3 will still work. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-217">CONFIGURATION-217</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new class PropertiesConfigurationLayout was introduced whose task is
        to preserve the structure (e.g. comments, blank lines) of a file
        loaded by PropertiesConfiguration. Each PropertiesConfiguration
        object is now associated with such a layout object. A saved properties
        file will look very similar to its original. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-104">CONFIGURATION-104</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>clone() methods have been added to BaseConfiguration, AbstractFileConfiguration,
        MapConfiguration, CompositeConfiguration, and CombinedConfiguration.
        So the most important Configuration implementations now support
        cloning. To ConfigurationUtils an utility method cloneConfiguration()
        was added that allows to conveniently clone a configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-145">CONFIGURATION-145</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>If a configuration file was to be loaded from classpath, the
        constructor of AbstractFileConfiguration dropped the file's path. The
        path is now taken into account. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-216">CONFIGURATION-216</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The getter methods for numeric data types in AbstractConfiguration now
        support conversions between different Number types, e.g. you can now
        call getLong(key) when key points to an Integer value. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-214">CONFIGURATION-214</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The new class DefaultConfigurationBuilder was added as an alternative to
        ConfigurationFactory. It provides some more features and creates a
        CombinedConfiguration object</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The new class CombinedConfiguration was added as a hierarchical
        alternative to CompositeConfiguration.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Support for low-level configuration events was added to all classes
        derived from AbstractConfiguration. The major part of this is handled
        by the new super class EventSource of AbstractConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-143">CONFIGURATION-143</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new method convertToHierarchical() was added to ConfigurationUtils,
        which is able to convert an arbitrary configuration object into a
        hierarchical configuration.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Loading of file-based configurations no longer throws a NullPointerException
        in setups where the thread context class loader is not set. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-63">CONFIGURATION-63</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to dom4j was removed; it was only used by two test classes,
        which have been re-written.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration used to drop the DOCTYPE declaration when saving the
        configuration. It is now able to extract the DTD's public and system ID
        and write them back (more complex DOCTYPE declarations are still not supported).
        With the new methods setSystemID() and setPublicID(), the DOCTYPE
        declaration can be configured. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-100">CONFIGURATION-100</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added two new constructors in CompositeConfiguration accepting a
        collection of configurations as a parameter. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-178">CONFIGURATION-178</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>(Basic) Support for declaring beans in configuration files was added.
        Some new classes in the beanutils package allow to create instances from
        these declarations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-186">CONFIGURATION-186</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The implementation of the interpolation features have been extracted out
        off AbstractConfiguration and moved to PropertyConverter. The
        interpolateHelper() method of AbstractConfiguration is now deprectated
        and will not be called any more during interpolation.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new method configurationsAt() was added to HierarchicalConfiguration
        that provides a convenient way of iterating over complex list-like
        structures without the need of manually constructing configuration keys
        with indices. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-182">CONFIGURATION-182</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>A new class SubnodeConfiguration was introduced that wraps a configuration
        node of a HierarchicalConfiguration. All operations performed on this
        configuration use this wrapped node as root. The new configurationAt()
        method of HierarchicalConfiguration returns such a SubnodeConfiguration
        for a specified sub node.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>With XPathExpressionEngine an expression engine for hierarchical
        configurations is now available that can evaluate XPATH expressions in
        property keys. This expression engine implementation is based on
        Commons JXPath, which is now declared as a new dependency (but at
        runtime it is only needed if the XPathExpressionEngine class is used). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-173">CONFIGURATION-173</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The code for interpreting property keys was refactored out off
        HierarchicalConfiguration. Instead this class now supports pluggable
        expression engines (using the setExpressionEngine() method). So it is
        possible to plug in different expression languages. A default expression
        engine is provided that understands the native expression language used
        by hierarchical configurations in older versions. During the process of
        this refactoring some methods of HierarchicalConfiguration have been
        deprecated; they will not be called any more when searching or adding
        properties. These are the following: createAddPath(), fetchAddNode(),
        findLastPathNode(), findPropertyNodes().</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>A larger refactoring was performed on the inner Node class of
        HierarchicalConfiguration: A ConfigurationNode interface was extracted
        for which a default implementation (DefaultConfigurationNode) is
        provided. HierarchicalConfiguration.Node now extends this default
        implementation. The new ConfigurationNode interface defines some more
        methods than the Node class did originally for conveniently dealing with
        sub nodes and attributes. HierarchicalConfiguration now uses the new
        type ConfigurationNode whereever possible. Some methods dealing with
        Node objects have been deprecated and replaced by versions operating on
        ConfigurationNode objects instead.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>All configuration classes derived from AbstractConfiguration now allow
        to set an instance specific list delimiter. This can be done through
        the new method setListDelimiter(). As before it is possible to define
        a default list delimiter, which will be used if no instance specific
        delimiter is set. This can be done using the new setDefaultListDelimiter()
        method (the methods get/setDelimiter() have been deprecated). With the
        new setDelimiterParsingDisabled() method parsing of lists can be
        disabled at all. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-155">CONFIGURATION-155</a>. Thanks to Jorge Ferrer.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.2 – 2005-12-17</h2>
<p>No changes in this release.</p></section><section><a id="a1.2-rc3"></a>
<h2>Release 1.2-rc3 – 2005-12-07</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now declares a dependency to Xalan. As with
        Xerces this dependency is only needed for JDK 1.3. It was introduced
        in a process of making Configuration buildable on a JDK 1.3. Documentation
        about the build process was also added.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The dependency to Commons Beanutils Collections was unnecessary and
        thus removed.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now depends on Commons Digester 1.6 instead of 1.5.
        (This was done only to pick up the latest available release of digester.)</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.2-rc2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.2-rc2 – 2005-11-23</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationDynaBean now implements the java.util.Map interface (as
        was stated in the javadocs). This was done by deriving the class from
        ConfigurationMap. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-2">CONFIGURATION-2</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.2-rc1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.2-rc1 – 2005-11-11</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The reload() method in AbstractFileConfiguration was updated to prevent
        reentrant invocation, which may be caused by some methods when they
        are called during a reloading operation. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-33">CONFIGURATION-33</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractHierarchicalFileConfiguration, a new base class for file based
        hierarchical configurations, was introduced. XMLConfiguration now
        extends this class.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg-oheger">ebourg, oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now prints the used encoding in the XML declaration of
        generated files. In earlier versions always the default encoding was
        written. PropertiesConfiguration now always uses the platform specific
        line separator when saving files. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-41">CONFIGURATION-41</a>. Thanks to Kay Doebl.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now translates properly the escaped unicode
        characters (like \u1234) used in the property keys. This complies with
        the specification of java.util.Properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-8">CONFIGURATION-8</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationConverter.getProperties() now uses the delimiter of the
        specified configuration to convert the list properties into strings. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-123">CONFIGURATION-123</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The interpolation of variables (${foo}) is now performed in all property
        getters of AbstractConfiguration and DataConfiguration. As a side effect
        the Properties object returned by ConfigurationConverter.getProperties()
        contains only interpolated values. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-123">CONFIGURATION-123</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now uses the ISO-8859-1 encoding by default
        instead of the system encoding to comply with the specification of
        java.util.Properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-35">CONFIGURATION-35</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>JNDIConfiguration no longer logs an error when attempting to get
        a property that doesn't exist in the configuration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-44">CONFIGURATION-44</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Attempting to load a configuration from a directory instead of a file
        will now throw a ConfigurationException. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-99">CONFIGURATION-99</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>If a multi-valued property was involved in an interpolation operation,
        AbstractConfiguration created a string representation of the list of all
        values. This was changed to only use the first value, which makes more
        sense in this context and is consistent with other getters for single
        valued properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-28">CONFIGURATION-28</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>If an include file with a relative path cannot be found in the base
        path, PropertiesConfiguration now also tries to resolve it based on its
        own location. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-83">CONFIGURATION-83</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed MapConfiguration to store the list of values added under a same
        key instead of the last value added. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-117">CONFIGURATION-117</a>. Thanks to Steve Bate.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in the handling of relative file names in ConfigurationFactory:
        In most cases relative file names were not resolved relative to the
        location of the configuration definition file as stated in the documentation.
        This behavior was now changed to always be in sync with the documentation.
        This may have an impact on existing code which uses workarounds for
        the erroneous resolving mechanism. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-80">CONFIGURATION-80</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Empty elements or elements whose content consists only of comments or
        whitespace are now taken into account by XMLConfiguration. They are
        added to the configuration; their value is an empty string. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-6">CONFIGURATION-6</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now sets a valid system id in the InputSource used for
        loading files. This enables XML parsers to correctly resolve relative
        files, e.g. DTDs.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>getKeys() in HierarchicalConfiguration now returns the keys in the same order the properties were inserted. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-74">CONFIGURATION-74</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now depends on Commons Collections 3.1 instead of 3.0</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>New configurations implementing the "property list" format used in
        NeXT/OpenStep and its XML variant used in Mac OS X.
        (PropertyListConfiguration and XMLPropertyListConfiguration). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-195">CONFIGURATION-195</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Resolved some issues with XMLConfiguration and properties containing
        the delimiter character. These properties are now correctly treated,
        escaping the delimiter will work, too. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-97">CONFIGURATION-97</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for XMLPropertiesConfiguration in ConfigurationFactory.
        A &lt;properties&gt; element will generate a XMLPropertiesConfiguration
        if the filename ends with ".xml".</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now supports escaped key/value separators in the keys
        (i.e foo\:key = bar). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-184">CONFIGURATION-184</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration now supports all key/value separators supported by java.util.Properties
        ('=', ':' and white space characters). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-166">CONFIGURATION-166</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Commons Configuration now depends on Commons Lang 2.1 instead of 2.0</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Comment lines for PropertiesConfiguration can start with the '!' char (compatibility with java.util.Properties). Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-207">CONFIGURATION-207</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Because ConfigurationUtils.copy() does not fully support hierarchical
        configurations a clone() method was added to HierarchicalConfiguration
        that can be used instead. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-84">CONFIGURATION-84</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now provides some support for validating XML
        documents. With the setValidating() method DTD validation can be
        enabled. It is also possible to set a custom DocumentBuilder allowing
        a caller to perform enhanced configuration of the XML loading process. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-206">CONFIGURATION-206</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractFileConfiguration now always sets a valid base path if the
        configuration file could be located. This allows PropertiesConfiguration
        to resolve include files even when loaded from class path. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-121">CONFIGURATION-121</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated XMLConfiguration to correctly deal with properties containing
        dots in their names. Such properties could not be accessed before. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-85">CONFIGURATION-85</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration's handling of backslash characters at the end
        of line was incorrect when there was an even number of trailing
        backslashes. This is now fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-9">CONFIGURATION-9</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a problem related to file based configurations that are loaded
        from a URL which is application/x-www-form-urlencoded: the save() method
        would store such files at a wrong location. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-130">CONFIGURATION-130</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated FileChangedReloadingStrategy to use the file based configuration's
        source URL to find the file to watch. Before that it was possible that
        the strategy checked the wrong file. For configuration files loaded
        from a jar FileChangedReloadingStrategy now checks the jar file itself
        for changes. Finally a bug was fixed which caused the strategy to
        check the watched file's last change date on every invocation of its
        reloadingRequired() method ignoring its refresh delay. Thanks to Jorge
        Ferrer. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-50">CONFIGURATION-50</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in the collaboration between XMLConfiguration and its
        reloading strategy: The configuration did not check its reloading
        strategy, so no reload was performed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-62">CONFIGURATION-62</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Disabled auto save mode during PropertiesConfiguration.load(). Prior
        it was possible that the properties file to be loaded was immideately
        overwritten. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-119">CONFIGURATION-119</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Under certain circumstances it was possible that a reloading strategy
        set for PropertiesConfiguration interferred with the save() method causing
        the configuration file to be erased. This has now been fixed. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-89">CONFIGURATION-89</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractFileConfiguration now stores the URL of the config file in the
        load() methods. This URL is reused by the save() method to ensure that
        the same file is written. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-94">CONFIGURATION-94</a>. Thanks to Jamie M. Guillemette.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLPropertiesConfiguration no longer depends on Digester to parse the
        configuration file, it's now implemented with a pure SAX parser. Thanks to Alistair Young.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug which causes XMLConfiguration.save to lose attribute values
        under some circumstances. The clear() method now also ensures that the
        associated DOM document is always cleared. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-49">CONFIGURATION-49</a>. Thanks to Mi Zhang.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now parse the configuration using the encoding
        declared in the XML header instead of the OS default encoding. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-13">CONFIGURATION-13</a>. Thanks to Kunihara Tetsuya.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>XMLConfiguration now uses the delimiter set by setDelimiter(char). Thanks to Zsolt Koppany.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.1 – 2005-04-02</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a ConcurrentModificationException thrown when calling clear()
        on a SubsetConfiguration applied to a BaseConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-134">CONFIGURATION-134</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>The resolveContainerStore() method in AbstractConfiguration now works
        properly with arrays of objects and arrays of primitives. This means
        it is possible to store an array of value in the configuration and
        retrieve the first element with the getString(), getInt()... methods. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-81">CONFIGURATION-81</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.1-rc2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.1-rc2 – 2005-03-06</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Updated documentation for FileConfiguration's load() methods. Fixed a
        problem in XMLConfiguration with the output of the save() method when
        multiple files were loaded. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-118">CONFIGURATION-118</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug in FileChangedReloadingStrategy preventing the detection
        of a file change in some cases.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Changed getXXXArray() and getXXXList() in DataConfiguration to return
        an empty array/list for empty values.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Fixed getLongArray(), getFloatArray() and getDoubleArray() in DataConfiguration,
        the values were cast into integers. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-58">CONFIGURATION-58</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.1-rc1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.1-rc1 – 2005-02-13</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationFactory now always configures digester to use the context
        classloader. This avoids problems in application server environments,
        which use their own version of digester. Thanks to Mike Colbert for the
        patch!. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-88">CONFIGURATION-88</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a new configuration, XMLPropertiesConfiguration, supporting the
        new XML format for java.util.Properties introduced in Java 1.5.
        A 1.5 runtime is not required to use this class. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-148">CONFIGURATION-148</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a comment header to PropertiesConfiguration. The header is not
        parsed when the file is loaded yet. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-190">CONFIGURATION-190</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added the setEncoding(String) and the getEncoding() methods to the
        FileConfiguration interface to control the encoding of the
        configuration file.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Access to the top level element of the XML document is now provided. For
        newly created configurations this element can be changed before the
        document is written. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-210">CONFIGURATION-210</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Merged the two XML related configuration classes into one new class
        XMLConfiguration. This new class should provide the best of its
        ancestors. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-168">CONFIGURATION-168</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Replaced the PropertyTokenizer inner class in AbstractConfiguration
        with the split method in PropertyConverter. Also moved the method
        building an iterator on the elements of a composite value in
        PropertyConverter as toIterator().</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Some cleanup of the handling of the base path in file based configurations.
        The base path is now always taken into account. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-15">CONFIGURATION-15</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Calling getProperties on a JNDIConfiguration no longer throws an
        UnsupportedOperationException.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_0812fcbcb1fde7d8.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Removed the getPropertyDirect method from AbstractConfiguration,
        concrete configurations now implement directly the getProperty method
        from the Configuration interface.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added implementation of a save() method for HierarchicalXMLConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-187">CONFIGURATION-187</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Constructing a file based configuration with a File no longer throws
        an exception when the file doesn't exist.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Saving a configuration now creates the path to the file if it doesn't exist.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>AbstractFileConfiguration.save(File) no longer fails silently when
        an error occurs, a ConfigurationException is thrown instead. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-45">CONFIGURATION-45</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationUtils.locate() now checks if the URL based resources exist.
        This fixes a bug preventing configuration files from being found if
        the configuration descriptor is in a JAR file (reported by Grant Ingersoll).</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed NPE that were caused in the constructors of file based
        configurations if an invalid file name was specified. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-96">CONFIGURATION-96</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added support for optional configuration sources in definition files for
        ConfigurationFactory. A new optional attribute allows to specify whether a
        configuration source is mandatory or optional. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-162">CONFIGURATION-162</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>JNDIConfiguration.getKeys() now returns an empty iterator instead of
        throwing a ConfigurationRuntimeException when a NamingException occurs.
        The NamingExceptions are now logged.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration.isEmpty() now returns true if an SQLException occurs.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added two methods copy(Configuration, Configuration) and
        append(Configuration, Configuration) in ConfigurationUtils to copy
        properties between configurations.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Moved the constructors implementations from PropertiesConfiguration and
        XMLConfiguration to AbstractFileConfiguration.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_0812fcbcb1fde7d8.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>Remove deprecated getVector() implementations.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>File based configurations can now be automatically reloaded when the
        underlying file is modified. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-147">CONFIGURATION-147</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a clear() method to the Configuration interface to remove
        all properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-156">CONFIGURATION-156</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a SystemConfiguration wrapping the system properties.
        ConfigurationFactory recognizes the corresponding &lt;system/&gt;
        element. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-208">CONFIGURATION-208</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a MapConfiguration to turn any Map into a Configuration. The
        getConfiguration() methods in ConfigurationConverter now use
        MapConfiguration, as a result the Configuration returned is always
        synchronized with the underlying Properties or ExtendedProperties,
        changes made to the Configuration are available in the Properties,
        and reciprocally.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The "autoSave" feature of XMLConfiguration has been generalized
        to all file based configurations. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-146">CONFIGURATION-146</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Numeric properties can now be specified in hexadecimal format,
        for example "number = 0xC5F0". Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-191">CONFIGURATION-191</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed HierarchicalConfiguration.getKeys(String), it returned an empty
        iterator if the prefix string contained indices. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-36">CONFIGURATION-36</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--oheger">oheger</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added a DataConfiguration decorator providing getters for all useful
        types found in a configuration (URL, Locale, Date, Calendar, Color,
        lists and arrays)</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Added 5 new configurations to be used in a web environment:
        AppletConfiguration, ServletConfiguration, ServletContextConfiguration,
        ServletRequestConfiguration, ServletFilterConfiguration.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.0"></a>
<h2>Release 1.0 – 2004-10-11</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>The getStringArray() method in CompositeConfiguration now interpolates
        the strings. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-66">CONFIGURATION-66</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>SubsetConfiguration now shares the "throwExceptionOnMissing" property
        with its parent. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-23">CONFIGURATION-23</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Removed "file:" at the beginning of the base path when calling
        setFile() on a FileConfiguration. This prevented auto saving an
        XMLConfiguration loaded from a File (issue reported by Mark Roth).</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>All NamingEnumerations in JNDIConfiguraiton are now properly closed (Suggested
        by Eric Jung).</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Properties added to an XMLConfiguration are no longer duplicated in the
        resulting XML file. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-90">CONFIGURATION-90</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.0-rc2"></a>
<h2>Release 1.0-rc2 – 2004-09-24</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Update" src="assets/images/update_a5b5d587fd3f7a4e.gif" title="Update"/></td>
<td>Unified the mechanisms for loading and saving file based configurations.
        PropertiesConfiguration, XMLConfiguration and HierarchicalXMLConfiguration
        now implement the same FileConfiguration interface. BasePathLoader,
        BasePathConfiguration, ClassPropertiesConfiguration and
        BasePropertiesConfiguration have been removed.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Replaced the calls to Boolean.booleanValue(boolean) in
        AbstractConfiguration and ConfigurationDynaBean to be Java 1.3
        compatible. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-22">CONFIGURATION-22</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Changing the prefix of a JNDIConfiguration will now reset the base context used. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-112">CONFIGURATION-112</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>The context used by JNDIConfiguration can be specified in its
        constructor or through the setContext() method. The context can be
        accessed with the getContext() method which is now public. Thanks to Eric Jung.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Make the behavior on missing properties for the get methods that
        return objects configurable. A property throwExceptionOnMissing
        can be set and then the getters throw an NoSuchElementException.
        The old default behavior of returning a null value has
        been restored.</td>
<td><a href="#team--henning">henning</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Allow configurations extending AbstractConfiguration to change the
        delimiter used from "," to something else. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-151">CONFIGURATION-151</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>PropertiesConfiguration.save() method has issues with preserving the filename</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Test cases for HierarchicalConfigurationXMLReader stores comments as text nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-132">CONFIGURATION-132</a>. Thanks to Mark Woodman.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Clarify for ConfigurationDynaBean that the get method should throw an
        illegalArgumentException if there is no property specified. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-183">CONFIGURATION-183</a>. Thanks to Ricardo Gladwell.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a ClassCastException when adding a non String property to an XMLConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-25">CONFIGURATION-25</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed the handling of attribute properties by HierarchicalConfigurationConverter. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-138">CONFIGURATION-138</a>. Thanks to Oliver Heger.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a ClassCastException thrown on adding a non string property
        in a DatabaseConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-125">CONFIGURATION-125</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>Bring back the getVector() methods in the Configuration interface.
        These methods are needed for "drop-on" replacement of the
        various pre-1.0 commons-configuration snapshots and are already
        deprecated. These methods will be removed for 1.1.</td>
<td><a href="#team--henning">henning</a></td></tr></table></section><section><a id="a1.0-rc1"></a>
<h2>Release 1.0-rc1 – 2004-08-14</h2>
<table>
<tr>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Changes</th>
<th>By</th></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>HierarchicalConfigurationXMLReader stores comments as text nodes. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-132">CONFIGURATION-132</a>. Thanks to Oliver Heger.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>project.xml contains bad dependencies. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-122">CONFIGURATION-122</a>. Thanks to Ricardo Gladwell.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>clearXmlProperty doesn't remove list properties completely. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-64">CONFIGURATION-64</a>. Thanks to Brent Worden.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>new ConfigurationDynaBean. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-183">CONFIGURATION-183</a>. Thanks to Ricardo Gladwell.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Add" src="assets/images/add_020e120150bcddbc.gif" title="Add"/></td>
<td>new ConfigurationMap and ConfigurationSet. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-185">CONFIGURATION-185</a>. Thanks to Ricardo Gladwell.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Problem adding property XMLConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-91">CONFIGURATION-91</a>. Thanks to Ricardo Gladwell.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Remove" src="assets/images/remove_0812fcbcb1fde7d8.gif" title="Remove"/></td>
<td>ConfigurationXMLDocument removed until post 1.0.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>DatabaseConfiguration doesn't support List properties. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-18">CONFIGURATION-18</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--epugh">epugh</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
<td>Fixed a bug related to XMLConfiguration. Can't add a new property as an
        attribute in XMLConfiguration. Fixes <a href="https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/CONFIGURATION-137">CONFIGURATION-137</a>.</td>
<td><a href="#team--ebourg">ebourg</a></td></tr>
<tr>
<td><img alt="Fix" src="assets/images/fix_06d45ccbb9b299a7.gif" title="Fix"/></td>
